ogTitle: Yarrawalla vs Yarrawonga South: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Yarrawalla and Yarrawonga South.
heading: Yarrawalla vs Yarrawonga South — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Yarrawalla, Victoria and Yarrawonga South, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Yarrawalla has a lower overall climate risk score (37/100) compared to Yarrawonga South (38/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Yarrawalla or Yarrawonga South safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Yarrawalla has a flood risk score of 28/100, while Yarrawonga South scores 42/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Yarrawalla scores 26/100 for bushfire risk. Yarrawonga South scores 36/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Yarrawalla or Yarrawonga South?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Yarrawalla has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.2% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
